value.found_quote: File checkpointing tracks file modifications made through the Write, Edit, and NotebookEdit tools during an agent session, allowing you to rewind files to any previous state.
value.rationale: The page explicitly documents Anthropic's "File Checkpointing" feature in the Claude Agent SDK, which allows users to save checkpoint/restore points (via checkpoint UUIDs) and rewind/roll back file changes made by the agent to any previous state. This directly substantiates the claim of "Checkpoint / rewind (Save points you can roll back to, and undo agent changes.)". The feature is documented as a fully implemented capability with code examples in both Python and TypeScript, indicating it is generally available (active).
